prompt: For a protein engineering research program, develop a specific protein binder targeting Structural polyprotein (precursor to capsid, E3, E2, 6K, E1) (alphavirus structural polyprotein (select agent)) expressed by Venezuelan equine encephalitis virus. The binder should achieve sub-nanomolar binding. outline a methodology for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using RoseTTAFold, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Provide guidance on validation approaches and experimental follow-up.
